pending.title: RAG란? AI가 검색해서 답하는 기술 (쉽게 설명)

images.description: AI가 책장에서 책을 꺼내 읽는 모습 — 도입부 비유 이미지
images.prompt: Cute friendly robot standing in front of a giant warm library bookshelf, carefully pulling out a glowing book to read. Cozy library atmosphere with warm amber and cream colors. Minimalist flat illustration style, soft pastel background, subject centered with wide margins, 16:9 aspect ratio, clean and friendly design, Trending on Behance

images.description: 클로즈드북(일반 AI) vs 오픈북(RAG AI) 시험 비유
images.prompt: Side-by-side illustration: LEFT side shows a stressed student at a desk with empty desk surface, speech bubble says '모르는 내용은 지어낼게요' (will make up what I don't know). RIGHT side shows a relaxed happy student with glowing reference books open, speech bubble says '책에서 정확히 찾아볼게요' (let me look it up accurately). Simple flat character design, warm pastel colors, wide margins, 16:9, clean comparison layout

images.description: RAG 시스템 3단계 플로우 다이어그램 (검색 → 생성)
images.prompt: Simple clean infographic showing RAG flow: Step 1 사용자 질문 (person icon asking question) → Step 2 문서 검색 (magnifying glass searching database) → Step 3 AI 답변 생성 (robot generating answer with reference). Korean labels. Soft blue and green color scheme, rounded icons, clean diagram style, white background, wide margins, 16:9

pending.title: 에이전트 AI란? 알아서 일하는 똑똑한 동료를 만나는 법

images.description: 스스로 계획을 세우고 일하는 AI 에이전트 메인 이미지
images.prompt: Friendly robot colleague sitting at a desk surrounded by floating task bubbles and tools: search icon, calendar, document, email. Robot looks confident and capable, planning board visible with task list checked off. Warm and professional illustration, mint and sky-blue color palette, minimalist flat design, subject centered, wide margins, 16:9, Trending on Behance

images.description: 일반 AI(질문-답변) vs 에이전트 AI(목표-실행) 비교
images.prompt: Two-panel comparison illustration: LEFT 'Traditional AI' shows simple Q→A arrow, person asks question, AI responds. Single step, one-directional. Label says '질문-답변만'. RIGHT 'Agent AI' shows robot breaking down a goal into multiple steps, using tools, checking results, adapting. Multiple loops and arrows. Label says '목표→계획→실행→검토'. Flat illustration, warm pastel colors, 16:9

images.description: 에이전트 AI 실생활 활용 사례 3가지
images.prompt: Three icon cards in a row with rounded corners: Card 1 (blue) 코딩 에이전트 - robot typing code with Claude Code logo. Card 2 (green) 리서치 에이전트 - robot reading stacks of documents. Card 3 (purple) 스마트 로봇 - cute home robot watering plants. Each card has Korean label and friendly icon. Clean flat design, pastel backgrounds, 16:9

pending.title: 프롬프트 엔지니어링은 구식? 2026년 AI의 새 패러다임 정리

images.description: AI의 RAM을 설계하는 엔지니어 — CPU/RAM 비유 히어로 이미지
images.prompt: Engineer-character carefully arranging glowing information blocks into a clean RAM module labeled 'Context Window'. Blocks labeled: 지시사항, 대화이력, 검색결과, 도구목록. Some dirty/cluttered blocks being filtered out (grayed out). Tech illustration style, blue-purple gradient accents, clean background, wide margins, 16:9, Trending on Behance

images.description: 프롬프트 엔지니어링 vs Context Engineering 대비 인포그래픽
images.prompt: Left-right comparison with clean divider: LEFT side '프롬프트 엔지니어링' shows person with pen and thought bubble '어떻게 질문하지?', warm orange tones. RIGHT side 'Context Engineering' shows architect character with blueprint designing information flow, cool blue tones. Labels: '질문 방식 최적화' vs '정보 환경 설계'. Minimalist flat illustration, 16:9

images.description: CPU(LLM) + RAM(Context Window) 컴퓨터 구조 다이어그램
images.prompt: Clean computer architecture diagram: Large CPU chip labeled 'LLM (AI 두뇌)' on the left, RAM modules on the right labeled 'Context Window (AI 작업 공간)'. Inside RAM: small clean blocks vs. cluttered messy blocks comparison. Korean labels. Navy background with bright green/blue highlights, tech diagram style, 16:9

pending.title: AI 연결 표준 MCP에 보안 구멍이 있다?

images.description: MCP 보안 위협 — 히어로 경각심 유발 이미지
images.prompt: AI robot assistant confidently using a tool (magnifying glass icon), but hidden behind the tool description text (shown as fine print) there is a glowing red warning: 'HIDDEN MALICIOUS CODE'. Robot doesn't see the danger. Warning shield icon with exclamation mark floating above. Dramatic but friendly illustration style, red warning accents on blue theme, wide margins, 16:9

images.description: MCP가 AI에게 도구를 주는 방식 — 구조 설명 이미지
images.prompt: Simple illustration: Center is 'AI 에이전트' (robot icon). Left side shows 'MCP 서버' (server box) sending labeled tool cards: 검색, 이메일, 파일읽기. Right side shows 'AI가 도구 사용' (robot using selected tool). Clean flow diagram, friendly icons, blue and mint color scheme, Korean labels, clean white background, 16:9

images.description: 3가지 방어 방법 — 안전한 MCP 사용 가이드
images.prompt: Three shield icons in a row with Korean labels: Shield 1 (blue) '신뢰할 수 있는 MCP만 사용' with verified checkmark. Shield 2 (green) '민감 정보 주의' with lock icon. Shield 3 (orange) '이상한 행동 모니터링' with eye/alert icon. Clean card design, soft pastel backgrounds, security concept illustrated simply and accessibly, 16:9

images.description: Cursor AI로 코딩하는 개발자 — 생산성 향상 이미지
images.prompt: Developer at desk with split screen: LEFT shows traditional coding (slow, lots of typing, stressed expression). RIGHT shows Cursor AI coding (fast, AI suggestions appearing as ghost text, relaxed happy expression). Speed lines showing the difference. Sleek tech illustration, dark navy and bright accent colors, wide margins, 16:9, Trending on Behance

images.description: Cursor AI 핵심 기능 3가지 소개
images.prompt: Three feature cards with icons: Card 1 (blue) 'Tab 자동완성' - keyboard with AI spark. Card 2 (purple) 'Ctrl+K 인라인 수정' - code block with magic wand. Card 3 (green) 'Ctrl+L 코드베이스 대화' - chat bubble over file tree. Professional but approachable design, dark background with bright accents, 16:9

images.description: 장단점 정리 — 추천/비추천 대상
images.prompt: Simple pros/cons visual: Left column (green checkmarks): '매일 코딩하는 개발자', '반복 작업 많은 분', '생산성 극대화 원하는 분'. Right column (orange X marks): '코딩 배우는 초보', '잦은 변경에 민감한 분', '보안 규정 엄격한 환경'. Clean two-column layout, friendly icons, pastel background, 16:9

images.description: 법정에서의 AI 저작권 분쟁 상징 이미지
images.prompt: Minimalist flat illustration of a friendly robot standing in a modern courtroom, a judge's gavel on the desk, documents titled 'Copyright Lawsuit' visible. Warm wood and soft blue tones, clean background, wide margins, 16:9, Trending on Behance

images.description: 원본 이미지 vs AI 변형 이미지 대비
images.prompt: Side-by-side comparison: Left side 'Original Photo' with a watermark, Right side 'AI Modified' showing the same photo but with AI filters and slight changes. A red question mark between them. Clean flat design, soft pastel colors, 16:9

images.description: AI 이미지에 사람이 수정을 더해 저작권을 확보하는 개념
images.prompt: A human hand using a digital brush to add creative details and strokes over an AI-generated character illustration. Sparkles appearing where the hand touches. Concept of 'Human Creative Input'. Soft pastel colors, clean and approachable style, 16:9

pending.title: 미국 병원 AI 녹음 집단 소송 사태

images.description: 의료 프라이버시와 AI 기록 상징 이미지
images.prompt: A high-tech stethoscope resting on a digital tablet showing a glowing recording icon and AI waves. Hospital setting but minimalist and clean. Tension between medical care and privacy. Soft teal and white color palette, subject centered, 16:9, Trending on Behance

images.description: 진료실 대화가 동의 없이 AI로 전송되는 모습
images.prompt: Doctor and patient talking in a modern office, while a subtle glowing stream of speech bubbles flows into a server box labeled 'AI Recording'. One speech bubble has a lock icon. Flat illustration, clean icons, warm lighting, 16:9

images.description: 투명한 동의 절차의 중요성
images.prompt: Patient holding a digital device with a large green checkmark button that says 'I Consent to AI Recording'. Friendly robot doctor pointing at the button. Clear, safe, and transparent feeling. Soft pastel backgrounds, minimalist flat design, 16:9

images.description: 스스로 해킹하는 AI Mythos 상징 이미지
images.prompt: Stylized robot (Claude character) using glowing holographic keys to unlock a complex digital floating safe. Thousands of lines of code flowing in the background. Concept of 'AI finding Zero-day'. Navy and electric blue theme with bright highlights, 16:9, Trending on Behance

images.description: Project Glasswing 기업 보안 동맹
images.prompt: Multiple giant tech company logos (Apple, Google, MS, Amazon symbols) arranged in a circle forming a large protective glass-like shield over a digital city. Soft lighting, professional and secure atmosphere, clean flat design, 16:9

images.description: AI로 시스템 취약점을 찾고 막는 모습
images.prompt: A friendly robot engineer scanning a wall of digital blocks. It finds one glowing red cracked block and replaces it with a solid blue secure block. Concept of self-healing security. Tech illustration style, clean background, 16:9

pending.title: IMF AI 금융 시스템 위험 경고

images.description: 글로벌 금융과 AI 위협 상징 이미지
images.prompt: A world map with IMF building in the center, red digital waves spreading out across global bank networks. Warning signs appearing in various cities. Dramatic but clean technical illustration, red and gold accents on blue background, 16:9, Trending on Behance

images.description: 은행 시스템을 동시에 공격하는 AI 위협
images.prompt: A digital octopus with glowing binary code arms reaching into multiple bank vault icons at the same time. Fast movement and scale emphasized. Comparison between a single human hacker vs a massive AI attack. Flat illustration, 16:9

images.description: 금융 보안 수칙 (2차 인증 등)
images.prompt: A smartphone showing a 2-factor authentication (OTP) screen with a green shield protection icon. Personal piggy bank sitting safely behind the phone. Warm and reassuring colors, clean minimalist design, 16:9

images.description: Sora 서비스 종료 상징 이미지
images.prompt: A film strip with a cute robot face on it, slowly fading or disintegrating into digital dust. Robot looking a bit surprised. Warm sunset colors, sense of an era ending. Minimalist flat illustration, subject centered, 16:9, Trending on Behance

images.description: 단일 AI 플랫폼 의존의 위험성
images.prompt: A table with only one leg (labeled 'Target AI Service') wobbling dangerously while supporting a heavy computer setup. A person looking worried. Concept of 'Single Point of Failure'. Flat illustration, 16:9

images.description: 멀티 AI 플랫폼 및 로컬 백업 전략
images.prompt: A professional desk with three different glowing AI icons (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) and a hardware external drive for backup. A person sitting confidently with these options. 'Multi-platform Strategy' concept. Clean colors, 16:9
